calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2026 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-13-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Victor Hwang; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:59am and concluding at 10:06am.

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc. was present represented by counsel Soheila Omari.
Defendant Hawks Ranch Trucking LLC not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines witness for Plaintiff BENJAMIN SEEMAN and he confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, and against Defendant Hawks Ranch Trucking LLC, as follows:

Damages: $38,500.44
Prejudgment Interest: $13,976.64
Attorney Fees: $3,900.00
Costs: $871.86

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $57,248.94

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
